name: ai-factory-runners
description: AI Factory runner workers: claim job_runs from Control Plane, execute handlers, report artifacts. Built from repo root (root package.json + tsconfig). Dependencies are provided by the root workspace — run npm install from repo root only; this package has no own dependencies.

scripts.build: echo 'Build from repo root: npm run build'
scripts.dev: echo 'Run from repo root: npm run dev:runner'
